cases.name: simple-table
cases.desc: Header and records encode in order, nothing escaped

cases.name: escape-rs-in-value
cases.desc: A value byte 0x1E must be DLE-escaped

cases.name: escape-newline-tab
cases.desc: LF and HT are control bytes: escaped in values

cases.name: trailing-empty-field
cases.desc: A trailing empty field encodes as a trailing US

cases.name: empty-record
cases.desc: A record of one empty field encodes as a bare RS

cases.name: binary-run
cases.desc: Every value byte < 0x20 is escaped, including unassigned codes

cases.name: high-bytes-unescaped
cases.desc: No byte >= 0x20 is ever escaped (UTF-8 passes through)

cases.name: file-two-groups
cases.desc: Document with FS name and two groups; canonical form has no EOT
